module.title: SAP TM Reporting, Analytics & Performance Management

learningObjectives.title: Understand reporting vs analytics
learningObjectives.description: Explain operational visibility reporting and trend-driven analytical decision support.

learningObjectives.title: Understand reporting domains
learningObjectives.description: Describe planning, execution, settlement, carrier, utilization, and cost report areas.

learningObjectives.title: Understand business value
learningObjectives.description: Clarify how dashboards and KPIs drive performance improvements and cost control.

sections.content: Reporting and Analytics in SAP Transportation Management transform operational transportation data into meaningful business insights. SAP TM provides operational reports, analytical dashboards and Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) that help transportation planners, logistics managers and executives monitor performance, control transportation costs and improve decision-making.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: Reporting explains what has happened, while analytics helps understand why it happened and supports better future decisions.

A logistics manager reviews the monthly transportation dashboard and observes that one carrier consistently delivers late while transportation costs have increased by 12%. Using SAP TM analytics, the manager identifies the root cause and renegotiates carrier contracts.

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Monitor KPIs regularly and review trend reports instead of relying only on daily operational reports.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A retail organization implemented SAP TM dashboards to monitor transportation costs and carrier performance. The analytics identified inefficient routes, reducing logistics costs by nearly 15% within six months.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: Certification questions often distinguish reporting from analytics. Reporting shows operational information, while analytics focuses on trends, KPIs and business optimization.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Reports alone do not improve transportation performance. Business users must analyze KPIs and take corrective actions based on the insights.

items: SAP TM Reporting provides operational visibility.
Dashboards help monitor costs, execution and carriers.
Reporting and analytics drive continuous logistics improvement.
